Building an NBA Shot Chart

May 20, 2026

I built a small interactive shot chart to explore player shooting patterns. The chart renders on a <canvas> element inside a React component — and because this site uses MDX, I can embed it directly in this blog post.

How it works

Each dot represents a shot attempt. Green dots are makes, red are misses. The data is synthetic for now, but swapping in real NBA shot-location data from the NBA stats API is straightforward.

MadeMissed

Next steps

  • Pull real data from stats.nba.com or nba_api
  • Add player/season filters
  • Animate shot sequences for a single game
  • Compute heat maps using kernel density estimation
